name: parallel-review
description: Review two repos in parallel, then create a summary

tasks.name: review-frontend
tasks.prompt: Review the codebase for code quality issues and create a REVIEW.md with findings.

tasks.name: review-api
tasks.prompt: Review the codebase for code quality issues and create a REVIEW.md with findings.

tasks.name: summary
tasks.prompt: Based on the reviews from the dependent tasks, create a consolidated IMPROVEMENTS.md with prioritized action items.
